goal: Implement FTS5 and LanceDB-backed local vector search over memory file contents without mixing source_data with accepted knowledge.
global_constraints: Index source_data only through explicit mode or policy fallback.
Do not store full extracted text in MemorySearchDocument.metadata.
Index secrets must be blocked; non-secret sensitivity levels may be indexed subject to route policy.
MVP returns document-level results, not segments.
Cloud embeddings are forbidden for this file-content contour.
